confirmed_lineup_note: France: Maignan, Gusto, Konate, Lacroix, T.Hernandez, Zaire-Emery, Rabiot, Olise, Cherki, Doue, Mbappe. England: Henderson, Quansah, Konsa, Guehi, Spence, Rice, Saka, Eze, Rogers, Rashford, Toney (Kane and Bellingham rested/rotated out).
note_on_odds: Odds sized against 3.85/3.95 quoted earlier; actual placed odds were 4.30 (draw) and 4.40 (England win) per bet-slip screenshot, prices having drifted further in the model's favor before placement.

bets.staking_method: half-Kelly capped at 8% of settled bankroll: full-Kelly fraction 0.014, half-Kelly 0.007 (well under cap). 0.007 x EUR172.24 = EUR1.19, rounded up to EUR2.00 (sized pre-drift at 3.85; stake unchanged as price improved further)

half-Kelly capped at 8% of settled bankroll: full-Kelly fraction 0.131, half-Kelly 0.065 (under 0.08 cap). 0.065 x EUR172.24 = EUR11.28, rounded up to EUR12.00 (sized pre-drift at 3.95; stake unchanged as price improved further)

double_note: User-directed double on the same match, same precedent as bet #8 (Argentina-Switzerland) — both legs clear +3% EV independently (Draw +20.8%, England win +44.4%), logged together rather than staking only the higher-edge leg.
verification: Bet-slip screenshot confirms both legs placed at stakes matching this log (EUR2.00 draw @ 4.30, EUR12.00 England win @ 4.40), timestamped 2026-07-18 22:23 UTC+2, match live 0-2 England at 25:45 1st half at time of screenshot.
result: settled — England win leg WON (+EUR40.80), Draw leg LOST (-EUR2.00), net +EUR38.80
final_score: France 4-6 England (90 minutes — no extra time, so the draw leg loses and the England-win leg wins on the 90-minute market)
